title: Costs
subtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.

overview.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
overview.budgetConsumed: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
overview.byAgentDesc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
overview.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.

finance.ledgerDesc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
finance.netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
finance.estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
finance.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.

budgets.controlPlaneDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
budgets.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
budgets.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
budgets.resolveHint: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
budgets.agentBudgetsDesc: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
budgets.projectBudgetsDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
budgets.noPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

providers.noCostEvents: No cost events in this period.

billers.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.

financeTimeline.emptyMessage: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
